text: {"acknowledges_specifics":true,"no_unverifiable_promise":true,"states_next_steps":true,"invents_no_policy":false,"consistent_with_gold":true,"within_length":true,"justification":"The draft addresses the user's 2025 transaction history and where to export it, avoids time-bound promises, gives clear next steps to export/check Documents/contact support, but it introduces a 1099 reporting-threshold policy not grounded in the ticket or gold notes; overall it's concise and aligns with directing to Activity and Documents with a CSV mention."}
